name: Turn Me Loose
keyWins: Champion Sprinter/Middle Distance Horse of the Year
description: A triple Group 1 winner and Champion Sprinter/Middle Distance Horse of the Year. Known for his devastating front-running style, he won the Emirates Stakes at Flemington and the Futurity Stakes at Caulfield. A cornerstone of the world-renowned Windsor Park Stud, Turn Me Loose stands alongside the likes of Shame Express (sire of global sprint sensation Ka Ying Rising), ensuring this filly comes from a farm with a proven habit of producing elite, high-performance athletes. As a sire, he has already produced Group 1 winner Lickety Split and multiple other stakes performers.
